infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: HRMS uses your location to verify office geofence during attendance check-in/out.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: HRMS uses your location to track attendance while you are checked in.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: HRMS uses Face ID to verify your identity before attendance check-in.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: HRMS uses the camera for face verification during attendance check-in and check-out.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: HRMS uses your location to verify office geofence during attendance.

plugins.faceIDPermission: Allow HRMS to use Face ID for secure attendance check-in.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow HRMS to use the camera for face verification during attendance.
